notes: English and Italian fields remain the original verified baseline.
Spanish, French, German, Simplified Chinese, and Russian support entries were re-audited on 2026-04-04 before re-exposing those UI languages.
German stock names use concatenation and Chinese stock names use the recovered Simplified Chinese ordering from zh_CN sources.
Russian stock names require a runtime genitive transform for the cation name; the stored names remain nominative for general UI display.
The inferred tennesside anion forms for es/fr/de/ru/zh were added conservatively because no pre-existing localized anion fields were present in the project data.
